common.goodbye: Take care and have a great day!
common.error: I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. Could you please try again?
common.help: If you need help, please contact your healthcare provider.

medication.reminder: It's time to take your medication.
medication.confirmation: Have you taken your medication today?
medication.missed_dose: If you missed a dose, please follow your doctor's instructions.
medication.side_effects: If you're experiencing side effects, please contact your doctor immediately.

appointments.reminder: You have an appointment scheduled for {date} at {time}.
appointments.confirmation: Please confirm your appointment by replying 'YES' or 'NO'.
appointments.reschedule: To reschedule your appointment, please contact our office.

wellness.mood_check: How would you rate your mood today on a scale of 1-10?
wellness.energy_check: How are your energy levels today?
wellness.sleep_check: How well did you sleep last night?
wellness.symptoms_check: Are you experiencing any symptoms today?

emergency.alert: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: If you're experiencing a medical emergency, please call emergency services immediately.
emergency.contact_doctor: Please contact your doctor as soon as possible.
emergency.urgent_care: Consider visiting urgent care if symptoms persist.
